infos.query: Are the Laleli Mosque and Esma Sultan Mansion located in the same neighborhood?
infos.raw: <search> Are the Laleli Mosque and Esma Sultan Mansion located in the same neighborhood? </search>

infos.answer: Yes, the Laleli Mosque and Esma Sultan Mansion are not necessarily located in the same neighborhood. The Laleli Mosque is located in Laleli, Fatih, Istanbul, Turkey. The Esma Sultan Mansion, also known as the Esma Sultan Palace, is located in Ortaköy neighborhood of Istanbul, Turkey.
infos.raw: <answer>Yes, the Laleli Mosque and Esma Sultan Mansion are not necessarily located in the same neighborhood. The Laleli Mosque is located in Laleli, Fatih, Istanbul, Turkey. The Esma Sultan Mansion, also known as the Esma Sultan Palace, is located in Ortaköy neighborhood of Istanbul, Turkey.</answer>
